response.justification: Strong general software engineer with 19 years of industry experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but critically lacks the 8+ years of production-grade AI systems experience required. No Python expertise documented (a required language), and no demonstrated knowledge of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks. The current role mentions MCP and agentic workflows, but provides insufficient evidence of deep AI/ML expertise needed for a Staff-level GenAI engineer.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with emphasis on testability, clean code, and TDD across 19 years of industry experience
Staff-level seniority with demonstrated mentoring and technical leadership capabilities
Full-stack versatility and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators in current role
concerns: No Python expertise documented despite being a required language for the AI/ML-focused role
Minimal documented AI/ML production experience (approximately 6 months in current role versus 8+ years required)
No evidence of vector database, RAG architecture, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph, CrewAI) knowledge

key_factors.factor: Strong general software engineering and seniority foundation
